case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: REIMBURSEMENT FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY MERINO BAIL BONDS
